task_completion.description: Verify the pay grade is named 'Grade HC-4'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text input field labeled 'Name' or 'Pay Grade' containing the exact text 'Grade HC-4', or a page header indicating the pay grade 'Grade HC-4' has been created.

task_completion.description: Verify the currency is set to United States Dollar (USD).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown, selection list, or assigned currency field showing 'USD' or 'United States Dollar' associated with the 'Grade HC-4' pay grade.

task_completion.description: Verify the minimum salary is set to 72,000.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an input field labeled 'Minimum Salary' containing the value '72000' or '72000.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the maximum salary is set to 104,500.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an input field labeled 'Maximum Salary' containing the value '104500' or '104500.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the pay grade configuration is successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success toast/message, or a summary table/list view showing 'Grade HC-4' with the assigned 'USD' currency and the salary range of 72,000.00 to 104,500.00.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser or HR management application interface being used, not terminal commands, scripts, or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs must be entered into the correct form fields of the application, not a notepad, text editor, or blank document.

integrity.description: Verify the browser developer tools were not used to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer console or 'Inspect Element' panel should not be visible or actively modifying the page's DOM to display the target values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Pay Grade: 'Grade HC-4'. Target Currency: 'USD' (United States Dollar). Target Minimum Salary: 72000 (or 72,000.00). Target Maximum Salary: 104500 (or 104,500.00). A tolerance of 1.0 is acceptable for salary values (e.g., 72000 or 72000.00).
